assistants.name: GitHub Copilot
assistants.description: AI pair programmer by GitHub that provides code suggestions, chat assistance, and integrates with VS Code and other IDEs.

assistants.name: Claude Code
assistants.description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool that operates in the terminal, understands project context, and performs multi-step development tasks.

assistants.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
assistants.description: OpenAI's cloud-based coding agent that can write and execute code, manage files, and interact with external tools via the command line.
